{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Workshop
| introduced = lh-04-the-pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[workshop]] is located near the [[vault]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c8">''The Pilot'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire locations]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
